questions.question: What is Retinitis Pigmentosa (RPE65)?
questions.answer: Retinitis Pigmentosa (RPE65) is a genetic condition that affects the retina, the light-sensitive tissue at the back of the eye. It causes progressive vision loss, starting with night blindness and peripheral vision loss, which can eventually lead to complete blindness.

questions.question: What is the Luxturna gene therapy?
questions.answer: Luxturna is a groundbreaking gene therapy treatment designed to treat inherited retinal diseases caused by mutations in the RPE65 gene. It works by delivering a normal copy of the RPE65 gene directly to the retina, potentially restoring vision or preventing further deterioration.

questions.question: How can I make a donation?
questions.answer: You can make a donation by transferring funds to the provided IBAN account (EG900010011000000100072764336) using the SWIFT code CIBEEGCX110. Alternatively, you can use the local account number 100072764336 for domestic transfers.

questions.question: Is my donation tax-deductible?
questions.answer: Please consult with your local tax advisor regarding the tax-deductibility of your donation, as regulations vary by country and jurisdiction.

questions.question: How will the funds be used?
questions.answer: All donated funds will be used exclusively for Hossam's medical treatment, including the Luxturna gene therapy procedure, hospital fees, medications, and any necessary follow-up care.
